results.title: Mackey's Hideout — Live music hideout, deep pours, and a roadhouse crowd worth following
results.text:
Shows

2601 S RIVER RD, MCHENRY IL

Beer

MCHENRY ROADHOUSE AND LIVE-MUSIC HIDEOUT

Mackey's Hideout

Weekly shows, Monday open mic, Wednesday karaoke, strong beer and whiskey credibility, and a regular crowd people describe as friendly and worth the drive.

See live music schedule
Open beer menu

Mackey's Hideout is a live-music-first bar in McHenry with weekly shows, Monday open mic, Wednesday karaoke, strong craft beer and whiskey cred, and the kind of regular crowd people describe as welcoming and worth the drive.

REPORTED HOURS AND WEEKLY RHYTHM

MONDAY

12pm – 2am

Open mic starts at 8pm on the official site schedule.

TUESDAY

12pm – 2am

Good for regulars, games, and drink-first visits.

WEDNESDAY

6am – 2am

Third-party hours report 6am; karaoke is listed at 9pm on the official site.

THURSDAY

12pm – 2am

Live music cadence continues into the weekend.

FRIDAY

12pm – 2am

Ticketed and cover-show nights show up often in the official schedule.

SATURDAY

8am – 2am

Big music nights and outdoor-ticket energy show up in reviews.

SUNDAY

8am – 2am

Afternoon sets and patio/outdoor mentions appear in public proof.

Reported by Restaurantji and Restaurant Guru on 2026-05-05. Owner confirmation still pending.

WHAT THE REVIEWS AGREE ON

People consistently describe Mackey's as a hidden-gem dive or roadhouse with strong acoustics, friendly bartenders, regulars who make the room feel easy, and live music that pulls people back week after week.

View highest-rated reviews
WHAT TO EXPECT BEFORE YOU GO

Craft beer, whiskey, and affordable drinks are the clearest beverage proof. Food mentions conflict, so this scaffold keeps the pitch conservative: frozen pizza, pizza/bar bites, or outside-food-friendly support rather than a full kitchen claim.
